parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Copy Method
parameters.description: Select which copy method to use from the menu options below.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output Method
parameters.description: Select which output method to use from the menu options below.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.label: Trigger Threshold
parameters.description: The threshold value for triggering copies.

parameters.name: keep
parameters.label: Keep Non-Scoped Channels
parameters.description: If enabled, non-scoped channels are copied to the output, otherwise they are deleted.

parameters.name: stamp
parameters.label: Stamp Inputs
parameters.description: Recook the second input for each triggered copy.

parameters.name: copy
parameters.label: Copy
parameters.description: Sequence of values available as stamps.

parameters.name: copy0param
parameters.label: Param
parameters.description: The parameters are re-calculated for each copy. Set the parameter name here and the value below. You can use Members and Methods. The parameters you set here are available to any in the network attach

parameters.name: copy0value
parameters.label: Value
parameters.description: Set the parameter's value to be copied.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
